title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/08/2024
Today, iron ore prices ran weak, accelerating their decline by the end of the session. The most-traded contract I2501 surged significantly, finallyclosing at 719.5 yuan/mt, with a daily drop of 2.24%. Overall market transaction atmosphere was average today.
